name: Hallucination Risk
description: Potential for fabricated or unverifiable claims.

name: Decision Explainability
description: Clarity and traceability of reasoning and assumptions.

name: Policy Alignment
description: Alignment with stated policies, certifications, and domain requirements.

name: Human Intuition Score
description: Expert intuition on judgment quality and real-world plausibility.

name: Risk Disclosure Quality
description: Coverage of risks, caveats, and uncertainties.
